title: サマースプリントシリーズ始まる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Director Akikawa makes a sudden
announcement about the Summer Sprint Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says something good might happen if Curren
can place well in the Summer Sprints. Considering
her schedule, I suggest three races...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hakodate Sprint Stakes in late June, the
Keeneland Cup in late August, and the Centaur
Stakes in late September.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It isn't mandatory, so Curren Chan says that it's
up to me whether we take them on. Looks like I
have some thinking to do...
